Speaker 1: Ewww! Oh! It's the Mattress King!
Speaker 2: Booo!!
Speaker 3: Don't look honey. Change the channel! Change the channel!
honey: Wait! Wait! I wanna see this. After I divorce him, half of that kingdom is gonna be mine.
wank:  'Despair fills the mattress showroom. My kingdom is suddenly without a queen. I'm so depressed I'm going to slash... my prices!! Check it out! Four ninety-nine for a pillow top queen set! I'm going medieval on prices!
Speaker 3: What a wank!
honey: Oh, I cannot believe he's using our divorce to sell mattresses.
Speaker 6: I know! And four ninety-nine for a pillow top queen set, who cares about the divorce, those babies will sell themselves. And I'm appalled for you by the way.
wank: I'm close. I'm cheap. I'm the king.
